steps.goal: Read the provided prompt and extract the three distinct facts about Open-Eywa. List these facts clearly and concisely.
steps.title: Extract and List Facts

steps.goal: For each of the three extracted facts, compose a short, operator-style phrase or sentence that incorporates the fact. These phrases should be suitable for inclusion in a final operator note.
steps.title: Draft Operator-Style Phrases for Each Fact

steps.goal: Combine the three operator-style phrases into a single, cohesive, and short operator-style note. The note should flow naturally and convey the information from the original facts in an operator-friendly format.
steps.title: Synthesize Final Operator Note
